name: Create personal npm repositories in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建个人 npm 仓库

name: Complete first npm build
hint: cd modules/npm-security/sample-project, configure npm to use your virtual repo, then run: jf npm install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-npm-sample --build-number=1
hint_cn: 进入 modules/npm-security/sample-project，配置 npm 指向你的虚拟仓库，然后运行上面的命令

name: Create a Curation Policy
hint: In JFrog UI: Curation → Policies → New Policy (name must contain your nickname)
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Curation → Policies → New Policy（Policy 名称必须包含你的昵称）

name: Trigger Curation to block axios@1.7.2
name_cn: 触发 Curation 阻断 axios@1.7.2
hint: Clear remote cache then run: jf npm install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-npm-sample --build-number=2
hint_cn: 清除远程缓存后运行：jf npm install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-npm-sample --build-number=2

name: Fix the issue and complete Build #3
hint: Change axios version in package.json to a safe version (e.g. 1.7.7), rebuild and publish Build #3
hint_cn: 将 package.json 中 axios 版本改为安全版本（如 1.7.7），重新构建并发布 Build #3
